title: Iran's threats against this Red Sea choke point are a big vulnerability for the oil market
summary_full: Oil prices would spike if Iran's Houthi allies started attacking ships passing through the Bab el-Mandeb Strait.
summary_public: Oil prices would spike if Iran's Houthi allies started attacking ships passing through the Bab el-Mandeb Strait.
